claim_bullets.bullet_text: Converting character data to monster data reduces dice rolling during combat and gives more time for game guidance (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.233-233).
Converting character data to monster data prevents critical hits from causing player frustration (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.233-233).
Monster level adapts directly from adventurer level, with agility and movement speed using character's agility score (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.234-234).

source_record_text: Rules for converting character data to monster data, including advantages, calculations, and examples like werewolves, werebears, and weretigers.
